title: CLI Entry Point & Command Routing

classes.name: cli
methods: main(): async void — top-level IIFE routing logic
showHelp(): void — prints usage to stdout, exits 0
showVersion(): void — reads package.json, prints version, exits 0
routing_logic: default (any other arg) → treat as detect shorthand, await detectCli()

classes.name: detectAntipatterns
methods: main(): async void — detectCli entry, scans files/dirs/URLs for anti-patterns
liveCli(): async void — starts/stops local HTTP overlay server; args: stop, --port=PORT, --help

classes.name: skillsCli
exported_methods: run(args: string[]): async void — sub-command router
internal_methods: showHelp(): async void — fetches /api/commands from API_BASE, prints table
install(flags: string[]): async void — runs npx skills add, optional prefix rename
update(flags: string[]): async void — downloads bundle, copies skills, re-applies prefix
check(): async void — downloads bundle, compares hashes, reports update status
findProjectRoot(): string — walks up dirs looking for .git
findInstalledProviders(root): string[] — checks PROVIDER_DIRS for skills dirs
isAlreadyInstalled(root): string|null — returns provider dir name or null
downloadAndExtractBundle(): Promise<string> — downloads zip to tmpdir, extracts
downloadFile(url, dest): Promise<void> — https GET with redirect support
isUpToDate(root, providers, bundleDir): boolean — hash-compares local vs bundle
deduplicateProviders(root, providers): {provider,localSkillsDir}[] — dedupes symlinks
renameSkillsWithPrefix(root, prefix): number — renames skill dirs, patches SKILL.md
undoPrefix(root, prefix): void — strips prefix from dirs and SKILL.md content
detectPrefix(root): string — finds current prefix from installed skill names
prefixSkillContent(content, prefix, allSkillNames): string
normalizeForHash(content): string — strips provider-specific paths for comparison
hashSkillsDir(skillsDir): string — SHA-256 hash of all SKILL.md files
getSkillsVersion(root): string|null — reads version from SKILL.md frontmatter
getModifiedSkillFiles(root, providerDirs): {file,flag}[]
copyDirSync(src, dest): void
isSkillDir(skillsDir, name): boolean
isRealSkillDir(skillsDir, name): boolean
escapeRegex(str): string
ask(question): Promise<string> — readline prompt

key_relationships: cli.js depends_on detectAntipatterns (dynamic import on demand for detect/live commands)
cli.js depends_on skillsCli (dynamic import on demand for skills command)
cli.js routes_to detectAntipatterns.detectCli — when command==='detect' or default
skillsCli.run delegates_to showHelp | install | update | check
important_notes: All imports are dynamic (await import(...)) — modules only loaded when their command is invoked. detectCli is exported as alias 'main as detectCli' from detect-antipatterns.mjs. The default case (unrecognised first arg) falls through to detectCli, allowing shorthand like 'npx impeccable src/'. skills.mjs uses PROVIDER_DIRS array to support 10 AI provider directories (.claude, .cursor, etc.).
